  "findings": [
    "Wrong solvent cement (glue) used on PVC conduit joints",
    "Lack of primer on PVC conduit joints"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop PVC conduit installation immediately",
    "Cut out and remove the improperly glued joints",
    "Re-install PVC conduit using the correct, approved PVC primer and solvent cement in accordance with manufacturer instructions and code"
  ],
  "rationale": "The use of incorrect glue and the omission of primer on PVC conduit joints violates code requirements for secure, liquid-tight, and approved joining methods. This creates a defective installation that must be remediated before the conduit run can be completed, pulled with wire, or inspected.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 352.48",
    "UL 651"
  ]
}
